#nullable enable

namespace Demo;

public partial class M
{
    public partial global::Demo.PersonDto Map(global::Demo.Person p)
    {
        if (p is null) throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(p));
        return new global::Demo.PersonDto
        {
            Age = p.Age,
        };
    }
}
